summary: Tested font changes to verify Muna font usage across UI chrome. Most elements pass. Two remaining issues: 'live preview' badge still uses IBM Plex Mono (font-mono class not removed), and <code> token ID elements use browser-default monospace (though font-mono class was removed, <code> tags are monospace by default in browsers).

ui_bugs.issue: 'live preview' span still has class 'text-xs font-mono font-medium' → renders in IBM Plex Mono. font-mono was NOT removed from this element.

Token IDs like --orange, --blue etc. use <code> tags which render with browser-default monospace (source-code-pro stack). font-mono class was removed but <code> elements are monospace by default. If these should use Muna, the <code> tag needs explicit font-family override in CSS.

action_items: Remove font-mono class from 'live preview' badge span in the component where it's rendered (likely App.js or a header component)
If token ID <code> elements must use Muna, add CSS rule: code { font-family: inherit; } or override in App.css
critical_code_review_comments: live preview badge span still has font-mono class - needs to be removed like other nav UI badges
passed_checks: Sidebar group labels (المبادئ, الهوية, المكونات, الأنماط, المنصات): Muna ✅
Typography --font token value shows 'Muna' (not full stack) ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: The main font changes are working. Two remaining: (1) 'live preview' span in header still has font-mono class. (2) <code> elements for token IDs use browser-default monospace. Typography section correctly shows --font = Muna.
